title: Slime Rule
description:
Follow in the footsteps of Fancy - a country girl, breaking into the Uzacan castle. A place where monsters live. Discover strange events. Collect rare treasures. Face the mighty demon lords. In this war, what makes the difference is knowledge. After this adventure, you will surely gain a lot of interesting and useful knowledge.Key Features- A lot of interesting quizs.

- Mixed RPG elements
- Relaxing game
description_short: A monster suddenly appeared, took over Uzacan castle. It destroyed a series of the world's top heroes, caused a worldwide uproar. The most shocking fact is that it's just a small slime.
